summary: Automate per-plan scoping so pushes stay within guardrails (derive file lists from plan receipts and emit reusable manifests/worktrees).

steps.title: Model scoped file set
steps.notes: Inspect plan receipts/steps to understand which paths must ship together.

steps.title: Implement CLI tooling
steps.notes: Expose `teof plan_scope` to list files and optionally materialize a scoped manifest/worktree.

steps.title: Document workflow
steps.notes: Capture usage in docs/automation (linking to push/preflight instructions).

checkpoint.description: Operators can run `teof plan_scope` to generate a scoped manifest/worktree before preflight/push.
